chapters.title: Monday Pitch
chapters.content: Sophia arrived early for the startup meeting. Today, she would present her idea to investors for the first time, and she wanted everything to be perfect.

chapters.title: Presentation Time
chapters.content: She explained the project clearly: a language learning app with immersive stories and AI support. The investors listened carefully and asked important questions.

chapters.title: A New Opportunity
chapters.content: After the meeting, one investor asked for a second conversation. Sophia smiled—this could be the beginning of something much bigger.
